title: Jonesiopsis evanescens

Within this subtribe, Jonesiopsis evanescens is part of the genus Jonesiopsis, which is a small group of orchids. The classification of Jonesiopsis evanescens is based on its unique characteristics, such as its floral structure and leaf morphology. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and diversity within the plant kingdom.
